channel.title: DevOps on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in DevOps on jamesm.blog

item.title: AWS S3 Files - Bridging File Systems and Object Storage
item.description: Explore AWS S3 Files, a new file system interface that brings high-performance file access to Amazon S3 data without duplication or complex integration.

item.title: DevOps in the Age of AI Agents
item.description:
For years, DevOps has been about breaking down silos and automating the software delivery lifecycle. We moved from manual deployments to Jenkins scripts, then to YAML-defined pipelines, and eventually to Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

But in 2026, the bottleneck is no longer the speed of the pipeline - it’s the speed of human decision-making within that pipeline. We are entering the era of Agentic DevOps.

From Automation to Autonomy

Traditional DevOps automation follows a strict “if this, then that” logic. AI-driven DevOps uses reasoning models to handle the “I’m not sure, let me figure it out” scenarios that typically stall a release.

item.title: DevOps Explainers
item.description: Educational explainer videos and articles covering DevOps concepts including APIs, databases, DNS, Git, and Linux fundamentals.

item.title: DevOps Best Practices
item.description: Curated collection of DevOps and system design best practices from industry experts covering microservices architecture and scalable system design.

item.title: DevOps Cheatsheets
item.description: Quick reference guides and cheatsheets for DevOps tools and cloud computing concepts.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Videos
item.description: Video recordings and keynote presentations from AWS Summit London 2023.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Agenda
item.description: Complete agenda of AWS Summit London 2023 with session codes, titles, and difficulty levels for all conference presentations.

item.title: List of DevOps Courses
item.description: Comprehensive collection of DevOps courses covering AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Linux, and cloud infrastructure training.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Agenda now available
item.description: AWS Summit London 2023 announcement with agenda, keynote information, and technical session details.

item.title: DevOps Books
item.description: Recommended reading list of DevOps and infrastructure engineering books covering cloud, containers, infrastructure as code, and programming languages.

item.title: DevOps Blogs
item.description: Curated list of DevOps and SRE blogs covering infrastructure, automation, continuous delivery, and operational best practices.

item.title: AWS re:Invent Slides (2022)
item.description: Curated collection of presentation slides from AWS re:Invent 2022 covering DevOps, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and security topics.

item.title: CI/CD Tools
item.description: Overview of popular CI/CD and continuous delivery tools for automating software builds, testing, and deployments.

item.title: Monitoring
item.description: Monitoring and observability tools for cloud infrastructure, applications, and systems including AWS CloudWatch, Datadog, Grafana, and Prometheus.

item.title: List of DevOps Conferences
item.description: List of major DevOps conferences and summits for learning about cloud infrastructure, operations, and industry best practices.
